home.name: Shreya Kakachery
home.tagline: Jack of all trades, Master of Data Science
home.bio: Actually, the full saying goes like this: 'Jack of all trades, master of none; still better than a master of one.' Here's my personal favourite: 'Curiosity killed the cat, but satisfaction brought it back.' Likewise, my goal is to expand my perspective; to live, learn, and grow. Experience is my teacher.

experience.description: Create and maintain a multilingual database of medical terminology.
Monitor and supervise examinations to ensure academic integrity.

projects.title: Shreya's Portfolio
projects.description: A website showcasing my projects and experience.
projects.why: To present my skills and accomplishments in a professional manner.

projects.title: Healthcare Database Website
projects.description: A website displaying medical terminology translated in multiple languages.
projects.why: To create a resource for Volentia Trandlation Services
